title: Story Maker
description: Make epic stories without command blocks!
body:
**This mod is in alpha version! except many bugs, use at your own risk!**

Make stories without any command blocks! All you need is this mod. To start, check out this guide (WIP). The mod is still in alpha version, so expect many bugs. I highly recommend using this with my other mod, [Objective Overlay](https://modrinth.com/mod/objective-overlay)

What does it do?
When player completes a task (for example travels to some location), a set of defined commands will get triggered, letting users make for example dialogs or rewards players. Another task is then triggered, with different location or task type.

Features:
1.  JSON tasks
2.  task types: GOTO, KILL, ITEM
3.  Command execution when task is completed
4.  Objective Overlay Integration


Planned features:
1. Visual editor
2. Automatic quote escaping (JSON)
3. Guide
4. Sidequests
5. More task types
